{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323162125E6E6B9D3433E34DC003E"}"},"total":3916},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7158442748998419213","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"构思巧妙，尤其是女县令这一话题。内容精彩，费话不多情结紧凑，引人入胜，希望作者快快写完，以后有更精彩的内容[赞][求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1666704926,"group_id":"7134514526820502566","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5w2DtRoGIOMWbOQzI2TX6s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"241521572979988","user_name":"爱吃异味草鱼的宓熙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"241521572979988","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7134514526820502566","book_info":{"abstract":"【女扮男装+基建＋主事业+超级护短＋女主人间清醒】
原书名《我在古代搞基建》
工科大佬唐一璇穿越了，成为代兄上任的清川县新县令。
为了活命，她绞尽脑汁挖空存货。
搞水利，起高楼，修水泥路，建造城池。
唐一璇弱冠之年，上至高门贵女，下至小家碧玉，都想着嫁她。
唐一璇：夭寿哦，我给不了你们性福。
为了挡桃花，她广纳学子，开办男女皆可读的新式学堂，传达一个思想：谈恋爱，不如搞基建！
唐一璇带领全县百姓开荒养殖，发展生态旅游，将清川县乃至整个北地，打造成人人都想抢的兵家必争之地。
一时谣言四起，得唐大人可安天下。
北苍王，一个十三岁带兵的少年英雄。
人人怕他、惧他、又仰慕他，崇拜他。
唯独唐一璇，坑他银子，挖他墙角，唆使他造反……
一不小心真的当了皇帝，北苍王最想做的事——娶唐一璇为后。
唐首辅：“我不入后宫。”
她的目标是海晏河清，八方朝贺！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/999a168406bc2bb239b44d508c981bef","author":"池米唐","author_id":"","book_id":"7134514526820502566","book_name":"替兄当官踏山河","book_short_name":"铁嘴女县令","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#407838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":388,"name":"女扮男装","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=388&name=女扮男装&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":458,"name":"护短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=458&name=护短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7134515559776911906","read_count":"13600","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1503515"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"777","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,女强,甜宠,女扮男装,护短,今穿古,大佬,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1c99453bba90c4d2b580aec4fa7b19d8~tplv-noop. 原书名《我在古代搞基建》
工科大佬唐一璇穿越了，成为代兄上任的清川县新县令。
为了活命，她绞尽脑汁挖空存货。

北苍王，一个十三岁带兵的少年英雄。
